news.paragraph: Shopify is facing regulatory scrutiny as its antitrust case moves forward, which keeps the company's platform power under focus. Options traders should weigh this legal development when considering potential volatility. No other immediate catalysts like earnings or product launches are noted in the recent headlines.
headlines: Shopify Antitrust Case Moves Forward Keeping Platform Power In Focus
